final:
module decoder_3to8 (
	input a, b, c,
	output [7:0] y);assign y = 1 << {a, b, c};

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      y[0] <= ~a & ~b & ~c; y[1] <= ~a & ~b & c; y[2] <= ~a & b & ~c; y[3] <= ~a & b & c; y[4] <= a & ~b & ~c; y[5] <= a & ~b & c; y[6] <= a & b & ~c; y[7] <= a & b & c;
    end
  end

endmodule
